audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L757 checks `auctionStart == 0 || auctionStart + duration < timestamp || timestamp < auctionStart` and returns 0 before any external calls (balanceOf, _getAssetPrice). Both the `auctionStart==0` and expired cases are caught by this early return, so no revert is possible on those paths. The natspec-documented revert risk (data feed answer <= 0 via toUint256) is only reachable for valid, non-expired auctions that pass the guard.
